# NextLocal AI

> NextLocal AI helps local businesses get recommended by AI assistants like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity. We provide free AI Visibility Reports and ongoing AI optimization services for contractors, home services, legal, medical, real estate, and other local businesses.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://nextlocal.ai/): AI visibility reports and optimization for local businesses
- [Get Free Report](https://nextlocal.ai/#get-report): Free AI Visibility Report — grades your business across Google Business Profile, reviews, citations, website, and discoverability

## What We Do

NextLocal AI is an AI visibility company based in Austin, TX. We help local businesses appear in AI-generated answers when potential customers ask ChatGPT, Gemini, or Perplexity for recommendations. Our free AI Visibility Report grades a business across five categories: Google Business Profile, reviews, citations, website quality, and discoverability.

## Services

- Free AI Visibility Report: Instant graded report showing how a local business ranks in AI answers
- AI Visibility Optimization: Ongoing service to build the authority signals that get businesses recommended by AI assistants
- AI Visibility Audit: 200+ query simulation across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity
